ogTitle: Hendon vs Henley Beach South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hendon and Henley Beach South.
heading: Hendon vs Henley Beach South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hendon, South Australia and Henley Beach South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Henley Beach South has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Hendon (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hendon or Henley Beach South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hendon has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Henley Beach South scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hendon scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Henley Beach South scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hendon or Henley Beach South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Henley Beach South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
